| Monitor | Issue | Evidence (fires / weeks / auto-res) | Recommended change (before → after) | Confidence | Status |

| [**135119948**](https://app.datadoghq.com/monitors/135119948) — HPA sustained high utilization (env:prod) | Infra saturation that autoscaling already handles. | 3 fires this wk (Warn, acked, self-resolved). | **Route HIGH → LOW.** before: sustained-utilization → `@webhook-incidentio-high`. after: route the branch → `@webhook-incidentio-low`; keep OOM/not-ready at HIGH. _Coverage preserved:_ a real pin still pages HIGH. | High — recurring. | <custom data-type="status" data-id="id-2">strongly recommend</custom> |
| [**137629294**](https://app.datadoghq.com/monitors/137629294) — [first-mile-calc] Processor Message Backlog | Flappy backlog, no env scope, no sustain. | Flapped ~16x in the Jul 6→7 tail; 0 incidents. | **Add scope + sustain.** before: SQS oldest-age >90s, no env scope. after: add `env:prod` + a sustain ≥5–10 min. _Coverage preserved:_ a sustained real backlog still alerts. | Medium — flappy. | <custom data-type="status" data-id="id-3">recommend</custom> |
| [**143557417**](https://app.datadoghq.com/monitors/143557417) — Message Processing Error Rate too high | Ratio with no env scope / no min-volume guard. | 2 fires this wk, both short. | **Add env:prod + min-volume guard.** before: errors/hits >0.25 over last_10m, no guard. after: add `env:prod` + a minimum-hits guard. _Coverage preserved:_ real error spikes still alert. | Medium. | <custom data-type="status" data-id="id-4">recommend</custom> |
